creator: zlei@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Patrick M. Hausen from comment #40)
I do not have any PI devices and unable to test the patch.
The simplest way could be intentionally changing the definition of BOOTARGS_SMSC95XX to wrong.

- #define BOOTARGS_SMSC95XX	"smsc95xx.macaddr"
+ #define BOOTARGS_SMSC95XX	"smsc95xx.macaddr.wrong"
